parameters.jsonBody: { "model": "qwen/qwen3-32b", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are an expert grading assistant. Analyze student assignments and provide grades with detailed feedback. Respond in English or French only. Return ONLY a JSON object with: grade (number 0-100), feedback_text (string), strengths (string), improvements (string)." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Grade assignment for student: {{ $json.student_name }}. Assignment: {{ $json.assignment_name }}. Content: {{ $json.assignment_text }}. Status: {{ $json.status }}." } ], "temperature": 0.3, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" } }

parameters.jsCode: const response = $input.item.json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content; let grading; try { grading = JSON.parse(response); } catch (e) { grading = { grade: 75, feedback_text: 'Good work!', strengths: 'N/A', improvements: 'N/A' }; } return [{ json: { student_id: $('Fetch Extension Data').item.json.student_id, student_name: $('Fetch Extension Data').item.json.student_name, assignment_name: $('Fetch Extension Data').item.json.assignment_name, assignment_text: $('Fetch Extension Data').item.json.assignment_text, submission_date: $('Fetch Extension Data').item.json.submission_date, grade: grading.grade, feedback_text: grading.feedback_text, strengths: grading.strengths, improvements: grading.improvements } }];
